description: A high-energy, command-center dashboard for tennis video analytics. Features deep obsidian backgrounds, sharp technical grids, and Volt Green accents inspired by the iconic tennis ball, emphasizing elite athleticism and data precision.

rules.anti_default: Avoid Inter/Roboto for headings. Use Outfit for a modern athletic feel.
rules.typesetting: Headlines must use tracking-tighter. Overlines must be uppercase with wide spacing.

layout.spacing: Dense and compact. Use p-4 to p-6 for widgets.

surfaces.cards: Flat solid background (bg-[#121212]), 1px solid border (border-[#2A2A2A]), no soft shadows. Tactical minimalism.
surfaces.glass: Rarely used. If needed for sticky elements, use bg-[#0A0A0A]/80 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-[#2A2A2A].

buttons.primary: bg-[#CEFF00] text-[#0A0A0A] font-bold hover:bg-[#B3E600] rounded-none px-6 py-3 transition-colors
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border border-[#2A2A2A] text-white hover:border-[#CEFF00] hover:text-[#CEFF00] rounded-none px-6 py-3 transition-colors

inputs.style: bg-[#121212] border border-[#2A2A2A] text-white focus:border-[#CEFF00] focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#CEFF00] rounded-none placeholder-[#A1A1AA]

video_player.wrapper: relative w-full aspect-video bg-black border border-[#2A2A2A] overflow-hidden rounded-md
video_player.overlays: Use absolute positioning with Volt Green (#CEFF00) for ball tracking arcs, bounding boxes, and stats.

charts.styling: Stroke width 2, no fill under lines unless using a strict gradient to transparent.

icons.style: Regular or Fill depending on active state. Sharp, technical.

motion.philosophy: Minimalist, tactile, and responsive. Feedback on interaction, no unnecessary bouncy animations.
motion.loading: Use sharp, linear progress bars in Volt Green (#CEFF00), not spinners.

urls.description: Aerial night view of a lit urban tennis court surrounded by dark buildings. Great for an atmospheric landing/login background.
Captivating shot of a male tennis player in motion. Use as a fallback or placeholder for the main video player.
A dimly lit outdoor tennis court at night with an umpire chair and tennis net.
Yellow tennis ball on brown floor. Use for empty states or specialized data blocks.

testing.data_testid: MANDATORY. All interactive elements must have data-testid (e.g., data-testid='upload-video-button').

instructions_to_main_agent: Use 'Outfit' for headings and 'Manrope' for body text. Do not use Inter or default generic fonts.
Rely heavily on the 'Control Room' bento grid protocol for the dashboard: grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 with gap-4 or gap-6.
Make the primary CTA and active states use #CEFF00 (Volt Green) for high contrast against the #0A0A0A background.
Card components should use flat solid backgrounds (#121212) with a 1px solid border (#2A2A2A). Do not use soft shadows.
Implement the Video Player as the Hero element of the dashboard layout, surrounded by stats and heatmaps.
Include a prominent drag & drop upload zone with a linear progress bar.
Do not use placeholder image services like via.placeholder.com. Use the provided media URLs.
